title: M.Y Penguin Peril Family Board Game | 2-4 Player Kids Family Game | Icebreaker, Penguin Drop Challenge
features: DON'T FALL INTO YOUR OPPONENT'S TRAP: The aim of the game is simple, take turns to remove the blocks of ice without letting the penguin fall. Whoever smashes the ice block that makes the penguin fall, loses!
QUICK PLAY TIME: The Penguin Peril game is super quick and easy to assemble - simply slide the blocks into the stand and then you're ready to play! Perfect for both adults and children alike.

GREAT FOR THE FAMILY: Suitable for between 2 and 4 players, this game is perfect for both adults and children alike . Box includes stand; ice blocks; 2x hammers; spinner & penguin. Suitable for ages 3+

DEVELOPS SKILLS: Penguin Peril is not only a fun family game, but also great education and hand eye co-ordination practice for children. Encourages hand eye co-ordination, logical and critical thinking, dexterity and has the added bonus of offering some no-screen time!
AN IDEAL GIFT: Not only is this the perfect game to bring the family together this festive season, the colourful box also makes this a fantastic gift
description: Product Description Play Together Who will win? Get some healthy competition going and play against friends and family with our selection of board games; or try your hand at a selection of the timeless classics from our Traditional Games range! Take a Break Take some time to unwind. Put down your phones, walk away from the screens, and spend some time in the moment. Reconnect and unplug with a collection of classic toys and games everyone can enjoy! Enjoy Outdoors Go and have some fun outside! Get active with our sports sets, or get the whole family involved with a garden game from our Royal Court range! Whether you're a sporting pro, or a total novice, there's something for all abilities. Board Games Pick from a selection of all the classics, old family favourites and even some novelty games you may not have played before! Perfect to take on family breaks, or add to the games collection for those rainy days and chilly winter weekends. Sit down, set up and play all your favourites! Sports Get active both indoors and outside with sports kits and equipment ideal to get newbies trying out different sports, get the gang together for a few friendly games, or to work on those skills! Check out all the favourites from badminton and tennis, to rounders, cricket, and football! Garden Games & Leisure Bring the fun outside with games built to level up the entertainment at any garden party, family gathering or BBQ. Play in the garden, take them to the park, or even down to the beach! Get out in the fresh air and switch off with some carefree fun! Action Sports Skateboards, Cruisers, Roller Skates... Grab your favourite set of wheels and get going with our action sports range ideal for all kinds of beginner and intermediate riders. Pick from a selection of colours and designs to find the perfect wheels for you! Board Games Sports Garden Games Action Sports
